prompt_text: Dense vines and crooked trees hide snarling Doberman scouts. Their amber eyes pierce through the foliage as they prepare to strike.

pass.message: You sliced through the thicket and defeated the Doberman scouts. The forest exhales, and you march on. +1 Max Health gained.

fail.message: You were overrun in the shadows of the Witherwild. The thicket swallows you whole.
